adjudication_raw: Votes: a1=critique_wins, a2=critique_wins, a3=critique_wins. Unanimous: critique_wins
assessor_1_raw: Assessor 1: PH assumption untested. Primary metric unspecified. Calibration claim not evaluated. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_2_raw: Assessor 2: Censoring asymmetry gives Cox an information advantage. PH assumption violation would invalidate results. Verdict: critique_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Assessor 3: Three genuine gaps in evaluation design. Calibration claim is central to hypothesis but untested. Verdict: critique_wins.
